candidate_summary: Form B impossibility/negation: machine unlearning under gradient descent cannot achieve true forgetting, by Loschmidt-microreversibility analogy. Both the empirical 'reversibility' version (2505.16831) and the formal 'impossibility of retrain equivalence' version (2510.16629) are directly published. Plus broader fundamental-limits umbrella (2511.12869).
reasoning: total_hits=10 >= 1 -> FAIL. Substantively Form B is occupied: 2510.16629 proves impossibility; 2505.16831 empirically validates it. The Loschmidt framing would add a thermodynamic motivation but no new claim.
